themes.reasoning_notes: Cheap attacker that gains haste when another colorless creature is on board, fitting aggressive colorless-leaning starts.
Eldrazi typeline and colorless-creature condition give it minor synergy in Eldrazi/colorless creature shells.
Three-mana 2/3 that conditionally gains haste is an aggressive rate/ability package, mainly rewarding early board development.
Its haste clause explicitly checks for another colorless creature, making it a modest payoff for colorless-creature shells more than generic tribal.
